dropzone_title: Drop document here or click to select
privacy: Images and PDFs are securely processed purely inside the browser (100% Offline OCR Architecture). No data is ever sent to external servers.
result_placeholder: The extracted result will appear here …
subtitle: Precise text extraction from images and PDF documents
tip_text: Tip: Drag rectangles onto the document. Move, resize by dragging the edges, or delete them using the [Del] key. Hold down the [Ctrl] key to move the visible area. Use the [mouse wheel] to zoom.
